infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RiderCircle needs your location to track rides and provide safety features.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: RiderCircle needs your location to track rides and provide safety features even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RiderCircle needs camera access to scan QR codes and capture ride photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RiderCircle needs photo library access to save ride photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: RiderCircle needs photo library access to save ride photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow RiderCircle to use your location for ride tracking and safety.
